name: Storyclock Viewer

releases.author: jonzfisher
releases.description:
First release of the Obsidian plugin for creating Storyclocks visuals of your film, presentation, or whatever else time-dependent story.

Removing some unused code, a bunch of comments, and adding validation for if the codeblock isn't in the right format instructing how to get it in the right format.

Example validation:
![image](https://github.com/jonzfisher/obsidian-chronostory/assets/6652546/35228822-64f0-435f-8283-63398cc2c2d3)

Tested on Obsidian for iOS
releases.name: A few bug fixes ahead of plugin review

releases.author: jonzfisher
